title: St. Francis Xavier Forane Church, Velur
tagline: St. Francis Xavier Forane Church, Velur — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Francis Xavier Forane Church, Velur, Kerala

overview.short: St. Francis Xavier Forane Church, Velur is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Francis Xavier Forane Church is at the center of Velur, Kerala, India. It is a Syro-Malabar Catholic Church, and a protected monument in the Archdiocese of Thrissur with considerable antiquity and spiritual heritage. Historically this Forane church has been the mother church of many parishes.

topPlaces.name: Velur, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Velur or Veloor is a village and panchayat in Kunnamkulam Taluk, Thrissur district, Kerala, India with a population of 22,155. Other places close to Velur are Kechery, Wadakkanchery etc.

topPlaces.name: Karuvathoor Sreeramaswami Temple
topPlaces.description: Karuvathoor Sree Ramaswamy Temple is a Hindu temple located at Kurumaldesam in the Velur panchayat of Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. This temple is located close to the Kurumal Sree Bhagawati Temple.

topPlaces.name: Mundathikode
topPlaces.description: Mundathicode is a village in Wadakkanchery municipality, Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Thangalur
topPlaces.description: Thangalur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Thayyur
topPlaces.description: Thayyur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. Thayyur is administered under Velur Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Chiranellur
topPlaces.description: Chiranellur is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Avanoor Sreekanteswaram Mahadeva is located at Avanur, Thrissur district, Kerala. The presiding deity of the temple is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Kottappuram, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Kottappuram or Kottapuram is a village in Kodungallur, Thrissur district, Kerala, India (Malayalam: കോട്ടപ്പുറം). Kottapuram is the southern boundary of Kodungallur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Francis Xavier Forane Church, Velur?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Francis Xavier Forane Church, Velur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Francis Xavier Forane Church, Velur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (60 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (76 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Francis Xavier Forane Church, Velur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Francis Xavier Forane Church, Velur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Francis Xavier Forane Church, Velur?
faq.a: Stays in St. Francis Xavier Forane Church, Velur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Francis Xavier Forane Church, Velur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Velur, Thrissur, Karuvathoor Sreeramaswami Temple, Mundathikode, Thangalur, Thayyur.
